policy: plot only locally decoded and graded complete checkpoints

methods.reason: official quantization and trellis decoder require CUDA-specific kernels and the released architecture scripts do not support LFM2.5; no exact MPS QWeight decoder exists yet
official implementation is CUDA/Llama-oriented and exact storage requires randomized-Hadamard and lattice-codebook decoder support not yet present in trusted QWeight
released algorithm depends on CUDA cuML; its standard per-matrix 65536-entry codebooks also exceed 3.5 physical BPW at 230M scale once codebook overhead is counted
the paper has no released reference implementation or checkpoint for LFM2.5, so an independently recreated result cannot yet be validated as the published method
